channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI startup Yotta seeks $4 billion valuation ahead of planned IPO
item.description: The Mumbai-based company is aiming to secure roughly $500 million to $600 million in capital and then file its formal listing documents within weeks, according to people familiar with the matter. It plans to raise a similar amount in the public offering.

item.title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
item.description: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI servers to China through shell companies.

item.title: Food Flavors Market to Register 4.9% CAGR Through 2031 Fueled by Natural Ingredient Trends and Rising Processed Food Demand, Reports Mordor Intelligence
item.description: The global food flavors market is projected to reach USD 27.12 billion by 2031 fueled by rising demand for natural ingredients, increasing processed food consumption, and continuous advancements in flavor technologies, with Asia-Pacific emerging as a key grow… [Intel]

item.title: Global Market | Hong Kong listings rush gathers pace withfive companies seeking $678 million
item.description: Hong Kong's stock market is experiencing a strong start to 2026. Five new companies launched offerings on Friday, seeking over HK$5.3 billion. This follows a robust January, making it the best start to a year since 2021. Mainland Chinese companies are driving…

item.title: Vibe coding startup Cursor launches programming-optimized Composer 2 model
item.description: Cursor today introduced an artificial intelligence model called Composer 2 that it says can outperform Claude Opus 4.6 across many programming tasks. The model is accessible through the company’s popular AI code editor. Cursor, which is incorporated as Anysph… [Intel, Anthropic]

item.title: AI will accelerate tech job growth - former Tesla president explains where and why
item.description: Venture capitalist Jon McNeill foresees growing demand for humans to sustain complex AI infrastructure and architecture. [Tesla]
